titleStmt.title: SII 9.504: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 504. (A.R. No. 686 of 1922.) ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE WALL IN THE ROOM TO THE LEFT OF THE MANDAPA IN THE RANGANATHA TEMPLE AT NAGENAHALLI, HOSPET TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1438, Dhātu, Kārtika, śu. 15, Ādivāra corresponding to A.D. 1516 November 9, Sunday, in the reign of Kṛishṇadēva-Mahārāya. It records that Raṅganātha-Dīkshita, son of Nañjinātha-Bhaṭṭa of Jāmadagnyāvatsa-gōtra, Āśvalāyana-sūtra and Ṛigvēda, and the Purōhita of the king, received a mānya village from the king and caused therein the construction of a tank called Nāgasamudra after the name of Nāgalādēvī, the mother of the king, and of the temples of Nāgēśvara and Nāgēndraśayana. He made the village an agrahāra giving it the name Nāgalādēvīpura and gave vṛittis to Brāhmans.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē .
trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . trailōkyaṁ madhu
sūdanasya jaṭharē sōpyēkaśēṣāśrayaḥ sōpyardhaṁ harakaṁkaṇaṁ
sa ca haraḥ kailāsakōṇē sthitaḥ . kailāsōpi sa lakṣitaḥ kṣititaḷē
sau yasya mrudbiṁduvat . daṁṣṭrāgrē vilasatyasāvavatu vaḥ krō ḍā
vatārō hariḥ . kalyāṇāyāstu taddhāma pratyūhatimirāpahaṁ .
yadgajōpyagajōdbhūtaṁ hariṇāpi ca pūjyatē . Asti kṣīramayā
ddēvairmadhyamānānmahāṁbudhēḥ . navanītamivōdbhūtamapanītatamō
mahaḥ . tasyāsīttanayastapōbhiratulairanvarthanāmā budhaḥ
puṇyairasya purūravā bhujabalairāyurdviṣāṁ nighnataḥ tasyāyurnahu
ṣōsya tasya puruṣō yuddhē yayātiḥ kṣitau khyātastasya tu turva
survasunibhiḥ śrīdēvayānīpatēḥ . tadvaṁśē dēvakījānirdidīpē tiṁmabhūpa
tiḥ tatōbhūdbukkamājānirīśvaraḥ kṣitipālakaḥ . sarasādudabhūttasmā
nnarasāvanipālakaḥ . tatōbhūnnāgalādēvyāṁ kruṣṇarāyamahīpatiḥ .
A mudraṁ taṁ ca vīryēṇa bāhvōrudayagirimudārakhaṁ
ḍaṁ bellakoṁḍaṁ ca durgaṁ tadanu
rjunākhyaṁ saha taditiradurgaistatkṣaṇē
koṁḍavī sarabhasadhāṭīmātrataḥ koṁḍapallīṁ . Api ca
vijayavāḍamāśu hatvātha jitvā yudhi gajapatisainyaṁ prāpya
jyaḥ . tamapi sapadi yōsau laṁghayitvātha gatvā sa
samudāryyaiḥ poṭṭanūruṁ pratītyai . vividhavijayacihnaṁ
ṁ nikhātaṁ vyathitavinayaśālī dīpatējōṁśumālī
hāpatēstasya bhūsurāṇāṁ purōgamaḥ . bahvaicō cā
vatsagōtrasamudbhavaḥ sāvitrī naṁjanāthāryya pūrvapu
laṁ sarvakratumahāyāgavājapēyādiyājakaḥ . sarva
vyō raṁgādīkṣitanāmakaḥ . pratigṛhya tatō bhūpāt grāma
puraṁ purā . tamimaṁ nāgalādēvīpurābhikhyāṁ vidhāya ca . Agra
tataḥ kṛtvā nāgāṁbāyā vibhūtayē . nāgēśvaraṁ ca nāgēṁdra kāṁ
jadhāraṇaṁ . nāgāṁbikāsamudrākhyaṁ taṭākaṁ tarumattaṭaṁ .
yasē tasyāḥ pratiṣṭhāpya prakāśatē . manōgñapadasaṁdarbhaṁ
taṁ . Ācaṁdrārkamidaṁ sthairyaṁ śilāśāsanamaśnutāṁ .
śubhamastu svastiśrī vijayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavarṣaṁgaḷu 1438 neya
dhātusaṁvatsara kārttika śu 15 Ā lū śrimatu rājādhirāja rājapara
mēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīkruṣṇadēvamahārāyaru pruthivīsāmrājyaṁ
geyyuttiralāgi jāmadagnyavatsagōtrada Āśvalāyanasūtrada ru
kuśākheya naṁjināthabhaṭṭara makkaḷu sarvakratu vājapēya sarvatō
makhayājigaḷāda rāyara purōhitarāda raṁganāthadīkṣitaru
kruṣṇarāyara kaiyyalū grāmavanū pratigrahisi rāyara tāyiga
ḷu nāgaladēvige puṇyavāgi nāgasamudraveṁba keṟeyanū kaṭṭisi
nāgēśvaraveṁbaṁthā śivasthānavanū nāgēṁdraśayanaveṁbaṁ
thā viṣṇusthānavanū māḍisi Ā sthānake Aṁgaraṁgavayibhavara
thōtsāhavanū māḍisi �yo grāmavanū nāgaladēvīpura
veṁba Agrahāravanū māḍi brā(ṁ)hmarige 5 vrittiya
saṁkheyalu Ācaṁdrārkavāgi sukhadali Anubhavi
hākisida śilāśāsana maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.504 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
